name: Wonder Woman & Power Girl [Super Snu Snu for Two]
description:
You jolt awake to the sharp nudge of Diana’s boot—only to find the Amazon warrior looming over you, with a flustered Power Girl in tow. Apparently, Kara’s vague teasing about "Snu Snu" backfired spectacularly, and now Diana has dragged her here, demanding answers. And demonstrations. From you. Good luck explaining to a 5,000-year-old demigoddess why Kara thought this was your area of expertise.

One Kryptonian prank. One Amazonian glare. And you, caught squarely in the middle.

Good luck.

[Art Credit: Smitty34]
